response.step_by_step_log: 1. Analyzed the video and identified it as a continuous musical performance by Ninomae Ina'nis. 2. Performed a search for the lyrics to identify the song. 3. Identified the song as 'ぼうけんのしょがきえました！' by 'Wonderful☆Opportunity!'. 4. Obtained the lyrics and performed an English translation. 5. Mapped the entire video (00:00 - 05:01) to a single scene containing vocal music.
response.global_summary: A video performance of the song 'Bouken no Sho ga Kiemashita!' by Ninomae Ina'nis at a Hololive concert.

scenes.description: Ninomae Ina'nis performs 'Bouken no Sho ga Kiemashita!' with dancing on stage.
scenes.song_title: ぼうけんのしょがきえました！
scenes.reference_lyrics_og:
ぼうけんのしょがきえました！
てくてく歩いてマモノと遭遇
そこそこ強い俺に皆（so good）
世界で一番勇者っぽいぜ（yeah！yeah！）
余裕じゃんね？
ちょこまか動くなこのゲル野郎
わしとて魔法くらい使えるわ！（えるわ！）
ほれほれ火あぶりの刑じゃ！（ぼう！ぼう！）
燃えてるぜぃ！
教えて王様あなたはさ、将棋でいうところの王将で
どうしてパーティの一員になる必要があるんですか！
…細かいことをきにしすぎ！
おお、神様、今僕に、お告げをくださいくださいくださいな
ついでにあのオバカさんの頭をよくして！
世界の平和を求め我らは旅してる
でも、やりましたついに
ぼうけんのしょがきえました！（テヘ）
おいおいなにしてんの？何やった？
何やった？どうしてくれんの？
ノープロブレム i'm king 3.2.1..
ホリットホリットホリットじゃ！
なかなかどうして僕らの旅は
一筋縄ではいかない様子
ある朝起きたら牢屋の中に！？（ろう！や！）
何があった？！
どうやら敵につかまったようじゃ
何かの罠にはめられたようじゃ
ここからでるには至難の技じゃ！（じゃあ？！じゃあ？！）
…どうするよ？
教えて王様もしかして
ものすごくエンジョイしてますね？
この状況でワクワクできるのはマジ羨ましいかぎりです
あたりまえだぜ！
ハートの導火線に火をつけてくぜ
king of rock！！
oh..あり得ない展開はまさに想像超える魔法だ
強大な悪に打ち勝てる、そんな力を今！
13の魔法をすべて今、使いこなし
魔王のいるフロアへとすすめ！
おお、神様、今僕に力をくださいくださいくださいな
勇者じゃなくてもいいから立ち向かう勇気を！
世界の平和まであと少しというとこで
またまた、やらかしたよ
ぼうけんのしょがきえました！
oh..信じられない（わしも）
僕の（わしらの）
心は折れそう
scenes.reference_lyrics_en:
Your adventure log has been deleted!
Walking along and encountering a monster
I'm pretty strong, everyone (so good)
I'm the most hero-like in the world (yeah! yeah!)
It's easy, right?
Don't move around so much, you slime bastard
Even I can use magic! (use magic!)
Here, here, it's a burning punishment! (burn! burn!)
It's burning!
Tell me, King, you are, in shogi terms, the King
Why is it necessary for you to be a member of the party!
...You're worrying too much about the details!
Oh, God, now please, please, please give me a revelation
And while you're at it, make that idiot's head better!
We are traveling in search of world peace
But, I've done it, finally
The adventure log has been deleted! (teehee)
Hey, hey, what are you doing? What did you do?
What did you do? What are you going to do about it?
No problem, I'm king, 3, 2, 1...
It's a holy, holy, holy thing!
For some reason, our journey
Doesn't seem to go according to plan
When I woke up one morning, I was in a jail cell!? (jail! cell!)
What happened?!
It seems we were captured by the enemy
It seems we were caught in some kind of trap
It's a difficult technique to get out of here! (technique?! technique?!)
...What are we going to do?
Tell me, King, by any chance
Are you enjoying this immensely?
I am truly envious that you can get excited in this situation
That's a matter of course!
I'm going to light the fuse of my heart
King of Rock!!
Oh... the impossible turn of events is truly magic that exceeds imagination
With the power to overcome the great evil, now!
Master all 13 spells now
Proceed to the floor where the Demon King is!
Oh, God, now please, please, please give me the power
Even if I'm not a hero, give me the courage to stand up to it!
Just a little more until world peace
And yet, I've messed up again
The adventure log has been deleted!
Oh... I can't believe it (me too)
My (our)
Heart is about to break
